task_objective: Implement percentage-based autosync status strip geometry using the Steam Deck OLED screenshot as the reference.
tests_added: Updated tests/test_frontend_static.py::test_frontend_status_strip_matches_steamos_visual_contract to require percentage-based strip height and bottom menu offset ratios.
design_decisions: Runtime BrowserView bounds use viewport-height ratios rather than fixed pixel values.
The Steam Deck OLED reference is documented as a 1280x800 viewport with a 38px status strip above a 21px bottom menu bar.
Existing centered icon/text layout and status color semantics are preserved.
results: The targeted frontend static test failed first against the fixed-pixel implementation and passed after the ratio-based update.
./run.sh pnpm run typecheck passed after the runtime update.
